source: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — colorful keyboard SVGs
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject
motif: Full keyboard cross-section with a brass/steel/copper weight plate seated in a routed cavity in the bottom case
subject: Keyboard cross-section (keycaps, top case, plate, PCB, standoffs, bottom case) showing a dense weight plate seated flush in a routed cavity beneath the PCB. The plate reads as solid mass via diagonal hatch fill and a heavier stroke weight than the surrounding hollow case shell. Faint dashed concentric arcs above the plate suggest damped resonance radiating through the case body. Terracotta callout labels the plate; bronze theme dot at upper-right.
